title: Proceed as if Success is Inevitable
excerpt: (photo of my quote that @mindbodygreen posted on Instagram!) This is the third video in my Brush Script series on YouTube . For the most part, I am using the same supplies on a weekly basis. SUPPLIES: Watercolor set |…
body:
This is the third video in my Brush Script series on YouTube. For the most part, I am using the same supplies on a weekly basis. 

SUPPLIES:
Watercolor set | Tim Holtz Detailer Tip Brush |  Regular Brush I used to use | American Crafts White cardstock 

Love reading the quotes in the comments of this YouTube video - great suggestions for quotes to script. Please let me know if you have a favorite too!
